text:
These same-chain same-token checks are fine — they only trigger when `fromChain.id === toChain.id`, so cross-VM won't be affected.

Now fix the `loadCurrencies` function — when it sets the default token for Solana chains, it uses the first currency from Relay which should already have the correct `11111...1` address. But let me verify the `isNative` check used to find the native token:
